title: FlowType
description: Protocol-aligned flow types. Each type maps to a fixed ordered step sequence. Issuance and verification flows are separate; application_approval_issuance is the multi-step application workflow.
$comment: flow_category derivation: ISSUANCE=[oid4vci_pre_authorized, oid4vci_authorization_code, mdl_issuance, application_approval_issuance], VERIFICATION=[oid4vp_presentation, mdl_presentation, siopv2], RENEWAL=[credential_renewal], REVOCATION=[credential_revocation], COMBINED=[combined]

oid4vci_pre_authorized.description: OID4VCI Pre-Authorized Code flow. Issuer provides a pre-authorized code; wallet exchanges it for a credential. Steps: create_offer → token_exchange → credential_request → issue_credential.

oid4vci_authorization_code.description: OID4VCI Authorization Code flow. Full OAuth2 authorization before credential issuance. Steps: create_offer → authorization → token_exchange → credential_request → issue_credential.

mdl_issuance.description: ISO 18013-5 mDL issuance. Steps: application_submit → validate_evidence → approval_decision → issue_mdl → deliver_credential.

oid4vp_presentation.description: OID4VP verifier-initiated presentation. Steps: create_request → wallet_selection → presentation_submission → verify_presentation.

mdl_presentation.description: ISO 18013-5 mDL proximity/online presentation. Steps: device_engagement → session_establishment → request_items → response_items → session_termination.

application_approval_issuance.description: Multi-step application workflow with evidence collection and approval. Steps: accept_application → validate_evidence → approval_decision → issue_credential → deliver_credential. approval_decision step is extensible via hooks.

credential_renewal.description: Renew an existing credential before or after expiry using OID4VCI with holder confirmation. Steps: validate_existing → create_offer → token_exchange → credential_request → issue_renewed_credential → revoke_old_credential.
credential_renewal.spec: OpenID for Verifiable Credential Issuance §6 (renewal variant)

credential_revocation.description: Revoke an issued credential record. Steps: validate_revocation_request → update_status_list → notify_holder.

combined.description: Combined issuance + verification flow. Credential is issued and then a presentation is requested in a single orchestrated sequence. Steps: accept_application → approval_decision → issue_credential → create_request → presentation_submission → verify_presentation.

siopv2.description: Self-Issued OpenID Provider v2 authentication flow. Steps: create_request → authentication_submission → verify_id_token.

physical_document_issuance.description: Physical document issuance for ICAO 9303 ePassports. Steps: accept_application → validate_evidence → approval_decision → generate_data_groups → sign_sod → submit_to_personalization → track_production → quality_verify → activate_credential.
